# Gigantification Potion

## Live / Mechanics Text

- Applies Gigantification: the next 2 Attacks you play deal triple damage.

---
<!-- META-AGENT NOTES — do not edit above this line -->
## Strategy Notes

<!-- Reserved for the meta-agent. Append lessons, combos, and heuristics here.
     Wiki facts live above the divider. -->
- Stronger than Flex Potion when the next one or two Attacks are large, copied, or multiplied by Vulnerable.
- Excellent phase-skip potion for bosses such as Test Subject; use before the large Attack, then re-read state before playing the copied/generated follow-up.
